aside.class: ut-account-sidebar ut-user-profile-sidebar tw-flex tw-min-h-[582px] tw-flex-col tw-rounded-[36px] tw-bg-white tw-px-5 tw-py-9

a.t-att-class: 'ut-user-profile-menu tw-flex tw-items-center tw-gap-5 tw-no-underline %s' % ('is-active tw-h-16 tw-rounded-[32px] tw-bg-[#f5f5f7] tw-px-3 tw-text-[#212529]' if active_account_page == 'profile' else 'tw-h-[47px] tw-text-[#939393]')

span.t-att-class: 'ut-user-profile-menu-icon tw-flex tw-h-[47px] tw-w-[47px] tw-items-center tw-justify-center tw-rounded-full %s' % ('tw-bg-[#050505] tw-text-white' if active_account_page == 'profile' else 'tw-bg-[#f5f5f7]')

a.t-att-class: 'ut-user-profile-menu tw-mt-5 tw-flex tw-items-center tw-gap-5 tw-no-underline %s' % ('is-active tw-h-16 tw-rounded-[32px] tw-bg-[#f5f5f7] tw-px-3 tw-text-[#212529]' if active_account_page == 'wishlist' else 'tw-h-[47px] tw-text-[#939393]')

span.t-att-class: 'ut-user-profile-menu-icon tw-flex tw-h-[47px] tw-w-[47px] tw-items-center tw-justify-center tw-rounded-full %s' % ('tw-bg-[#050505] tw-text-white' if active_account_page == 'wishlist' else 'tw-bg-[#f5f5f7]')

a.t-att-class: 'ut-user-profile-menu tw-mt-5 tw-flex tw-items-center tw-gap-5 tw-no-underline %s' % ('is-active tw-h-16 tw-rounded-[32px] tw-bg-[#f5f5f7] tw-px-3 tw-text-[#212529]' if active_account_page == 'orders' else 'tw-h-[47px] tw-text-[#939393]')

span.t-att-class: 'ut-user-profile-menu-icon tw-flex tw-h-[47px] tw-w-[47px] tw-items-center tw-justify-center tw-rounded-full %s' % ('tw-bg-[#050505] tw-text-white' if active_account_page == 'orders' else 'tw-bg-[#f5f5f7]')

a.t-att-class: 'ut-user-profile-menu tw-mt-5 tw-flex tw-items-center tw-gap-5 tw-no-underline %s' % ('is-active tw-h-16 tw-rounded-[32px] tw-bg-[#f5f5f7] tw-px-3 tw-text-[#212529]' if active_account_page == 'settings' else 'tw-h-[47px] tw-text-[#939393]')

span.t-att-class: 'ut-user-profile-menu-icon tw-flex tw-h-[47px] tw-w-[47px] tw-items-center tw-justify-center tw-rounded-full %s' % ('tw-bg-[#050505] tw-text-white' if active_account_page == 'settings' else 'tw-bg-[#f5f5f7]')

a.class: ut-user-profile-logout tw-flex tw-h-[47px] tw-items-center tw-gap-5 tw-text-red-600 tw-no-underline

span.class: tw-flex tw-h-[47px] tw-w-[47px] tw-items-center tw-justify-center tw-rounded-full tw-bg-red-600 tw-text-white

section.class: ut-user-profile-page tw-min-h-screen tw-bg-[#f5f5f7] tw-px-6 tw-py-10 lg:tw-px-12

div.class: ut-user-profile-shell tw-mx-auto tw-mt-[96px] tw-grid tw-max-w-[1460px] tw-grid-cols-[269px_minmax(0,1fr)] tw-gap-11

aside.class: ut-user-profile-sidebar tw-flex tw-min-h-[582px] tw-flex-col tw-rounded-[36px] tw-bg-white tw-px-5 tw-py-9

a.class: ut-user-profile-menu is-active tw-flex tw-h-16 tw-items-center tw-gap-5 tw-rounded-[32px] tw-bg-[#f5f5f7] tw-px-3 tw-text-[#212529] tw-no-underline

span.class: ut-user-profile-menu-icon tw-flex tw-h-[47px] tw-w-[47px] tw-items-center tw-justify-center tw-rounded-full tw-bg-[#050505] tw-text-white

a.class: ut-user-profile-menu tw-mt-5 tw-flex tw-h-[47px] tw-items-center tw-gap-5 tw-text-[#939393] tw-no-underline

span.class: ut-user-profile-menu-icon tw-flex tw-h-[47px] tw-w-[47px] tw-items-center tw-justify-center tw-rounded-full tw-bg-[#f5f5f7]

a.class: ut-user-profile-menu tw-mt-5 tw-flex tw-h-[47px] tw-items-center tw-gap-5 tw-text-[#939393] tw-no-underline

span.class: ut-user-profile-menu-icon tw-flex tw-h-[47px] tw-w-[47px] tw-items-center tw-justify-center tw-rounded-full tw-bg-[#f5f5f7]

a.class: ut-user-profile-menu tw-mt-5 tw-flex tw-h-[47px] tw-items-center tw-gap-5 tw-text-[#939393] tw-no-underline

span.class: ut-user-profile-menu-icon tw-flex tw-h-[47px] tw-w-[47px] tw-items-center tw-justify-center tw-rounded-full tw-bg-[#f5f5f7]

a.class: ut-user-profile-logout tw-flex tw-h-[47px] tw-items-center tw-gap-5 tw-text-red-600 tw-no-underline

span.class: tw-flex tw-h-[47px] tw-w-[47px] tw-items-center tw-justify-center tw-rounded-full tw-bg-red-600 tw-text-white

div.class: tw-mb-6 tw-rounded-2xl tw-border tw-border-green-200 tw-bg-green-50 tw-px-5 tw-py-3 tw-text-[14px] tw-font-medium tw-text-green-700
tw-mb-6 tw-rounded-2xl tw-border tw-border-red-200 tw-bg-red-50 tw-px-5 tw-py-3 tw-text-[14px] tw-font-medium tw-text-red-700

form.t-att-class: 'ut-user-profile-form tw-grid tw-grid-cols-[minmax(0,582px)_minmax(260px,394px)] tw-gap-20 is-editing' if error_message else 'ut-user-profile-form tw-grid tw-grid-cols-[minmax(0,582px)_minmax(260px,394px)] tw-gap-20 is-readonly'

button.class: ut-user-profile-edit tw-h-[45px] tw-rounded-[22.5px] tw-border tw-border-[#525252] tw-bg-transparent tw-px-5 tw-text-[16px] tw-text-[#525252]
tw-h-12 tw-w-32 tw-rounded-3xl tw-border-0 tw-bg-[#212529] tw-text-[16px] tw-text-[#f5f5f7]

a.class: tw-flex tw-h-12 tw-w-32 tw-items-center tw-justify-center tw-rounded-3xl tw-border tw-border-[#525252] tw-text-[16px] tw-text-[#525252] tw-no-underline

div.small: Info diskon, flash sale, dan voucher.

p.span: Ubah password Anda perlu verifikasi terlebih dahulu
Setelah Anda menghapus akun Anda, tidak ada jalan kembali. Harap pastikan

form.p: Masukkan password dan login akun untuk mengonfirmasi tindakan ini.

label.span: Masukkan email dan nomor telepon saya ke daftar blokir agar tidak dihubungi lagi.

section.class: ut-user-profile-page ut-user-orders-page tw-min-h-screen tw-bg-[#f5f5f7] tw-px-6 tw-py-10 lg:tw-px-12

div.class: ut-user-profile-shell tw-mx-auto tw-grid tw-max-w-[1460px] tw-grid-cols-[269px_minmax(0,1fr)] tw-gap-11

aside.class: ut-user-profile-sidebar tw-flex tw-min-h-[582px] tw-flex-col tw-rounded-[36px] tw-bg-white tw-px-5 tw-py-9

a.class: ut-user-profile-menu tw-flex tw-h-[47px] tw-items-center tw-gap-5 tw-text-[#939393] tw-no-underline

span.class: ut-user-profile-menu-icon tw-flex tw-h-[47px] tw-w-[47px] tw-items-center tw-justify-center tw-rounded-full tw-bg-[#f5f5f7]

a.class: ut-user-profile-menu tw-mt-5 tw-flex tw-h-[47px] tw-items-center tw-gap-5 tw-text-[#939393] tw-no-underline

span.class: ut-user-profile-menu-icon tw-flex tw-h-[47px] tw-w-[47px] tw-items-center tw-justify-center tw-rounded-full tw-bg-[#f5f5f7]

a.class: ut-user-profile-menu is-active tw-mt-5 tw-flex tw-h-16 tw-items-center tw-gap-5 tw-rounded-[32px] tw-bg-[#f5f5f7] tw-px-3 tw-text-[#212529] tw-no-underline

span.class: ut-user-profile-menu-icon tw-flex tw-h-[47px] tw-w-[47px] tw-items-center tw-justify-center tw-rounded-full tw-bg-[#050505] tw-text-white

a.class: ut-user-profile-menu tw-mt-5 tw-flex tw-h-[47px] tw-items-center tw-gap-5 tw-text-[#939393] tw-no-underline

span.class: ut-user-profile-menu-icon tw-flex tw-h-[47px] tw-w-[47px] tw-items-center tw-justify-center tw-rounded-full tw-bg-[#f5f5f7]

a.class: ut-user-profile-logout tw-flex tw-h-[47px] tw-items-center tw-gap-5 tw-text-red-600 tw-no-underline

span.class: tw-flex tw-h-[47px] tw-w-[47px] tw-items-center tw-justify-center tw-rounded-full tw-bg-red-600 tw-text-white

article.t-att-class: 'ut-user-order-card %s' % ('ut-is-hidden' if active_order_status != 'all' and item.get('status') != active_order_status else '')

div.div: Tidak ada pesanan pada status ini.
